operation.add: <?php if (!empty($schema_product)) { ?> <script type="application/ld+json"><?php echo $schema_product; ?></script> <?php } ?> <?php if (!empty($schema_breadcrumb)) { ?> <script type="application/ld+json"><?php echo $schema_breadcrumb; ?></script> <?php } ?> <?php if (!empty($schema_organization)) { ?> <script type="application/ld+json"><?php echo $schema_organization; ?></script> <?php } ?> <?php if (!empty($schema_website)) { ?> <script type="application/ld+json"><?php echo $schema_website; ?></script> <?php } ?>

<?php if (!empty($schema_organization)) { ?> <script type="application/ld+json"><?php echo $schema_organization; ?></script> <?php } ?> <?php if (!empty($schema_website)) { ?> <script type="application/ld+json"><?php echo $schema_website; ?></script> <?php } ?>
